page_metadata.biotools__summary: Optimised tool designed for quality control and assessment of high-throughput sequencing data that performs parallel processing of entire files and produces a report which contains a set of high-resolution graphics.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Optimised tool designed for quality control and assessment of high-throughput sequencing data that performs parallel processing of entire files and produces a report which contains a set of high-resolution graphics.
